name: Geometric Configurations of Perturbed Jailbreak Prompts
summary: arXiv:2607.20581v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Perturbation techniques that turn unsuccessful jailbreak prompts into successful ones are continuously evolving, constituting a major security thre...
description: arXiv:2607.20581v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Perturbation techniques that turn unsuccessful jailbreak prompts into successful ones are continuously evolving, constituting a major security threat to LLM safety. In this paper, we investigate the internal representations of such string-level perturbed jailbreak inputs in the small weight models of the Qwen-2.5-1.5B/-3B/-7B-Instruct and Llama-...
author: Lynn Delcon, Andres Algaba, Vincent Ginis
